# Glyphic

> Glyphic is a visual editor for Mermaid diagrams. Build, animate, compare, and share architecture diagrams without leaving your browser.

## Getting Started
- [Editor Basics](/docs/getting-started/editor-basics)
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started)
- [Quickstart](/docs/getting-started/quickstart)

## Guides
- [Exporting](/docs/guides/exporting)
- [Guides](/docs/guides)
- [Sharing](/docs/guides/sharing)
